Thank you for contacting us! Your message has been submitted.

Reiki support for balance, grounding, and connection

I support you if you're feeling overwhelmed or out of balance, helping you find more steadiness through Reiki.

At Lotus Path Wellness, I offer Reiki sessions designed to support your nervous system, ease mental tension, and help you reconnect with yourself.

Whether you're feeling stressed, disconnected, or simply in need of space to breathe, this is a place where you can slow down and reset.

I offer:

  • In-home Reiki sessions
  • Mobile Reiki sessions
  • Distance Reiki sessions

If you're unsure where to begin, you're welcome to book a free introductory call to ask questions and see what feels right for you.

Free Call Book Session
